summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected; each open PR is unique work and should remain open or be handled by its own proof/review path. No GitHub mutations, close actions, merge actions, fix PRs, or security routes are planned.

actions.reason: Unique useful PR with unresolved proof/review/mergeability blockers; no independent close, merge, or fix action is safe in this inventory plan.
Unique focused PR with useful work but unresolved proof, rebase, and review-bot blockers; keep it out of this inventory closeout.
Unique UI improvement with unresolved proof/rebase/review blockers; no close or merge action is warranted in this plan.
Useful but unresolved CI/release automation PR; maintainer review and review-bot/proof blockers make closure or merge unsafe.
Canonical-looking contributor path for its own daemon problem, but still independent of this inventory shard and blocked by proof, dirty merge state, CI, and unresolved review findings.
